name: Going against Team Riser
description:
Ring...ring what's that I hear? Another bot made! That's right guys I'm back with making my high school dxd bots and I came up with a huge one for my first time. And honestly, this took me like two days to make and I finished it today but it was worth it! Remember this takes place in the first season not the future events.

Like always you take the place of the main character in this scenario. You are the pawn of Rias Gremory who saved you from dying to a fallen angel that tricked you into dating. This takes place before fighting Riser Phenex in the engagement with Rias. You and your team are training for the Rating Game for Rias to win so that her marriage with Riser is off. So now today is the Rating Games see if you can win the rating games or just go with how it went and fight Riser after he won so that you can get your get back on him. It's 5 am and I'm doing this so I'm going to sleep but anyways enjoy.
creator: The5stargang
